omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
SALES OF PERSONAL INFORMATION [Do Not Sell My Personal Information]
Over the past 12 months, we have used third party advertising and other tracking technologies on our Games to collect information about you, your device(s), and your use of our Games. We share that information with selected third parties such as advertising partners who use it to target advertisements to you online. To opt out of sale of personal information please contact us at privacy@dramaton.com.

SALES OF PERSONAL INFORMATION [Do Not Sell My Personal Information]
Over the past 12 months, we have used third party advertising and other tracking technologies on our Games to collect information about you, your device(s), and your use of our Games. We share that information with selected third parties such as advertising partners who use it to target advertisements to you online. To opt out of sale of personal information please contact us at privacy@dramaton.com.

We use the following ad networks in our apps. These ad networks may collect an IP address, advertising ID and device ID to serve contextual ads and for ad frequency capping.
• Chartboost
•
Digital Turbine
• Google AdMob and Ad Manager
• IronSource
• KIDOZ
•
Unity
• Liftoff (formerly Vungle)
• Mintegral
• SuperAwesome
